recommendations.title: The Loved Ones
recommendations.overview: When Brent turns down his classmate Lola's invitation to the prom, she concocts a wildly violent plan for revenge.

recommendations.title: Dangerous Liaisons
recommendations.overview: In 18th century France, Marquise de Merteuil asks her ex-lover Vicomte de Valmont to seduce the future wife of another ex-lover of hers in return for one last night with her. Yet things don’t go as planned.

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: Bruno's plan to win back his ex-girlfriend hits a snag when he becomes attracted to her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Camille Claudel
recommendations.overview: The life of Camille Claudel, a French sculptor who becomes the apprentice of Auguste Rodin and later his lover. Her passion for her art and Rodin drive her further away from reason and rationality.

recommendations.title: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: Rei helps the woman she's been in love with for years escape her abusive husband. While on the run, their feelings for each other catch fire.

recommendations.title: Feeling Minnesota
recommendations.overview: Sam Clayton's marriage to ex-stripper Freddie comes about when she's strong-armed into the match by Red, a club proprietor who once did her a favor. But Freddie falls in love with Jjaks, Sam's brother, and the pair tries to escape the situation toget

recommendations.title: Red Notice
recommendations.overview: An Interpol-issued Red Notice is a global alert to hunt and capture the world's most wanted. But when a daring heist brings together the FBI's top profiler and two rival criminals, there's no telling what will happen.

recommendations.title: Catch and Release
recommendations.overview: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

recommendations.title: Kick
recommendations.overview: An adrenaline junkie walks away from a whirlwind romance and embraces a new life as a thief, though he soon finds himself pursued by veteran police officer and engaged in a turf war with a local gangster.
